name: Freezer Pancake Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together into a large bowl.
2. Add the shortening and cut it in with a pastry blender until combined.
3. Add the eggs and milk, stirring until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into a container for the freezer and cover tightly.
5. The recipe will keep for about a year. Use a one-quart milk carton for keeping the mixture.
6. Note: Thaw the mixture the night before using.
